zh.Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾哈特利 霍爾梅
zh.Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley於1309年3月25日出生在英國斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素時，他的父親John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley37歲，母親Hawise de Muscegros32歲。他於1330年10月20日之前與Margaret在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1350年8月28日享年41歲。

zh-hans.Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾哈特利 霍爾梅
zh-hans.Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley于1309年3月25日出生在英国斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素时，他的父亲John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley37岁，母亲Hawise de Muscegros32岁。他于1330年10月20日之前与Margaret在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1350年8月28日享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley was born on 25 March 1309, in Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, his father, John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley, was 37 and his mother, Hawise de Muscegros, was 32. He married Margaret before 20 October 1330, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 28 August 1350, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley est né le 25 mars 1309, à Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Muscegros, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret avant 20 octobre 1330, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 28 août 1350, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley am 25. März 1309 in Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley 37 und seine Mutter Hawise de Muscegros 32. Er hat vor 20. Oktober 1330 in England, United Kingdom Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 28. August 1350 im Alter von 41 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley è nato il il 25 marzo 1309 nel Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Hawise de Muscegros, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret prima del 20 ottobre 1330, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 28 agosto 1350, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartleyが1309年3月25日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチャートリー カストルで生まれた時，父John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartleyは37歳，母Hawise de Muscegrosは32歳であった。1330年10月20日以前にイギリスイギリスでMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1350年8月28日に41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley(이)가 1309년 3월 25일 영국 스태퍼드실르 처틀리 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise de Muscegros(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1330년 10월 20일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1350년 8월 28일 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.25 March 1309–28 August 1350: 25 de março de 1309–28 de agosto de 1350
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley nasceu em 25 de março de 1309, em Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Muscegros, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret antes 20 de outubro de 1330, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1350, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley родился 25 марта 1309 г. в местности чартли кастл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Muscegros, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret перед 20 октябрь 1330 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 28 августа 1350 г. в возрасте 41 год.

es.25 March 1309–28 August 1350: 25 de marzo de 1309–28 de agosto de 1350
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley nació el 25 de marzo de 1309, en Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Hawise de Muscegros, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margaret antes de 20 de octubre de 1330, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1350, a la edad de 41 años.
